'''âd-j-l-sh''' ('''kadajleshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lucubrate|lucubrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lucubrate|lucubrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-j-l-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadajleshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidajleshoko|thidajleshoko]] || [[word:jidajleshoko|jidajleshoko]] || [[word:shidajleshoko|shidajleshoko]] || [[word:kidajleshoko|kidajleshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudajleshoko|thuthudajleshoko]] || [[word:jujudajleshoko|jujudajleshoko]] || [[word:shushudajleshoko|shushudajleshoko]] || [[word:kukudajleshoko|kukudajleshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudajleshoko|thudajleshoko]] || [[word:judajleshoko|judajleshoko]] || [[word:shudajleshoko|shudajleshoko]] || [[word:kudajleshoko|kudajleshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudajleshoko|thudajleshoko]] || [[word:judajleshoko|judajleshoko]] || [[word:shudajleshoko|shudajleshoko]] || [[word:kudajleshoko|kudajleshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedajleshoko|thedajleshoko]] || [[word:jedajleshoko|jedajleshoko]] || [[word:shedajleshoko|shedajleshoko]] || [[word:kedajleshoko|kedajleshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodajleshoko|thothodajleshoko]] || [[word:jojodajleshoko|jojodajleshoko]] || [[word:shoshodajleshoko|shoshodajleshoko]] || [[word:kokodajleshoko|kokodajleshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodajleshoko|thodajleshoko]] || [[word:jodajleshoko|jodajleshoko]] || [[word:shodajleshoko|shodajleshoko]] || [[word:kodajleshoko|kodajleshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodajleshoko|thodajleshoko]] || [[word:jodajleshoko|jodajleshoko]] || [[word:shodajleshoko|shodajleshoko]] || [[word:kodajleshoko|kodajleshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdajleshoko|thĂŠdajleshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdajleshoko|jĂŠdajleshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdajleshoko|shĂŠdajleshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdajleshoko|kĂŠdajleshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadajleshoko|thathadajleshoko]] || [[word:jajadajleshoko|jajadajleshoko]] || [[word:shashadajleshoko|shashadajleshoko]] || [[word:kakadajleshoko|kakadajleshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajleshoko|thadajleshoko]] || [[word:jadajleshoko|jadajleshoko]] || [[word:shadajleshoko|shadajleshoko]] || [[word:kadajleshoko|kadajleshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajleshoko|thadajleshoko]] || [[word:jadajleshoko|jadajleshoko]] || [[word:shadajleshoko|shadajleshoko]] || [[word:kadajleshoko|kadajleshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
